summary: Comprehensive testing of 'Função na OT' (Function in OT) feature implementation. All backend APIs pass (9/9 tests). Frontend features verified: Função column in registos table, Função na OT dropdown in manual record modal, and Tipo de Colaborador in tarifa form.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Função na OT feature fully implemented and working. OT#356 used for testing (id: 8d3a0111-8f03-45d5-a7eb-2cbfcc96ad85). Existing records default to funcao_ot='tecnico' (shown as cyan badge). Admin tarifa form is at /admin under 'Tabela de Preço' tab.

verified: funcao_ot is stored and returned in cronometro object
funcao_ot is preserved when cronometro is stopped and registo is created
funcao_ot defaults to 'tecnico' if not provided
tipo_colaborador is stored and returned correctly
Existing records have funcao_ot='tecnico' as default
'Função' column header exists in registos table
Técnico badges displayed with cyan background (bg-cyan-600/20)
All existing records show 'Técnico' badge correctly
Modal opens from '+ Novo Registo' button
'Função na OT *' field exists with data-testid='manual-funcao-ot-select'
Tarifa cards show 'Ajudante' badge for specific tariffs

cronometro_funcao_popup.note: The function popup for chronometer requires selecting technician checkboxes first. The buttons are disabled when no user is selected. Feature code verified in TechnicalReports.jsx lines 9119-9190. data-testid='crono-funcao-select-0' exists for function select.

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/ot356_detail.png - OT modal showing registos table with Função column
.screenshots/novo_registo_modal.png - Manual record modal with Função na OT dropdown
.screenshots/nova_tarifa_modal.png - New tarifa form with Tipo de Colaborador
